1.0.0.en: First public release. Pair Delta Dore Tydom thermostats and control temperature, mode, on/off and boost from Homey. Includes flow triggers for setpoint overshoot/undershoot and flow actions to start or stop boost.

1.0.1.en: First public release. Pair Delta Dore Tydom thermostats and control them from Homey.

1.0.2.en: Addresses Homey App Store review feedback: tagline-style description, dedicated app icon, simplified flow card titles.

1.0.3.en: Rewritten README that better explains what the app does and why it is useful in Homey flows.
